---
title: "Glass Type API"
description: "Determine the type of glass (window/non-window) based on its components"

image: ../../../assets/images/glass.jpg
image-alt: "Project 2"

badges:
  - label: R
    class: bg-primary
  - label: plumber
    class: bg-success

appText: "Read article"

links:
  - url: https://github.com/stesiam/GlassAPI
    icon: bi-github
    text: Repo
    
toc: true
toc-location: left
comments: false
lang: en
order: 2
---
